college: College of Geosciences and College of Agriculture & Life Sciences

units.title: AI for Weather and Climate
units.description: Deep learning for numerical weather prediction, climate downscaling, and severe weather detection.

units.title: Atmospheric Data Science
units.description: Large-scale climate datasets, reanalysis products, Python for geosciences, and cloud computing.

units.title: Remote Sensing and Satellite Meteorology
units.description: GOES/NEXRAD data, satellite retrieval algorithms, and ML-enhanced remote sensing products.

units.title: Advanced GIS and Spatial Analytics
units.description: ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, spatial machine learning, geodatabases, and spatial data engineering.

units.title: Remote Sensing and Earth Observation
units.description: Satellite imagery analysis, LiDAR processing, change detection, and deep learning for land cover.

units.title: Smart Cities and Urban Analytics
units.description: Urban data, mobility analytics, smart infrastructure, and AI-driven city planning.

units.title: Precision Agriculture and Drone Technology
units.description: UAV-based crop monitoring, variable rate technology, yield mapping, and AI for agronomy.

units.title: Machine Learning for Agriculture
units.description: Crop yield prediction, pest detection, soil analysis, and climate impact modeling.

units.title: Agricultural IoT and Smart Farming
units.description: Sensor networks, edge computing in agriculture, water management automation, and smart greenhouse.

units.title: Bioprocess Engineering and Biomanufacturing
units.description: Fermentation, bioreactor design, downstream processing, and AI-driven bioprocess optimization.

units.title: Environmental Systems Modeling
units.description: Watershed modeling, groundwater simulation, environmental data science, and sustainability analytics.
